channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] Multiverse Computing pushes its compressed AI models into the mainstream
item.description:
📊 Score: 170 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ⭐A-Authority:openai(+70)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release

📄 Summary: After compressing models from major AI labs, including OpenAI, Meta, DeepSeek, and Mistral AI, Multiverse Computing has launched both an app that showcases the capabilities of its compressed models and an API that makes them more widely available....

item.title: [3] [模型算法] AHOY! Animatable Humans under Occlusion from YouTube Videos with Gaussian Splatting and Video Diffusion Priors
item.description:
📊 Score: 117 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • L3-Tech:diffusion(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: We present AHOY, a method for reconstructing complete, animatable 3D Gaussian avatars from in-the-wild monocular video despite heavy occlusion. Existing methods assume unoccluded input-a fully visible subject, often in a canonical pose-excluding the vast majority of real-world footage where people are routinely occluded by furniture, objects, or ot...

item.title: [5] [大V/权威] The Onion's Exclusive Interview with Sam Altman

item.title: [6] [模型算法] Unified Spatio-Temporal Token Scoring for Efficient Video VLMs
item.description:
📊 Score: 103 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L2-Tech:pruning(+25)
  • L3-Tech:transformer(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Token pruning is essential for enhancing the computational efficiency of vision-language models (VLMs), particularly for video-based tasks where temporal redundancy is prevalent. Prior approaches typically prune tokens either (1) within the vision transformer (ViT) exclusively for unimodal perception tasks such as action recognition and object segm...

item.title: [7] [模型算法] Loc3R-VLM: Language-based Localization and 3D Reasoning with Vision-Language Models
item.description:
📊 Score: 103 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made impressive progress in connecting vision and language, but they still struggle with spatial understanding and viewpoint-aware reasoning. Recent efforts aim to augment the input representations with geometric cues rather than explicitly teaching models to reason in 3D space. We introduce Loc3R-VLM, ...

item.title: [8] [模型算法] AdaRadar: Rate Adaptive Spectral Compression for Radar-based Perception
item.description:
📊 Score: 103 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Radar is a critical perception modality in autonomous driving systems due to its all-weather characteristics and ability to measure range and Doppler velocity. However, the sheer volume of high-dimensional raw radar data saturates the communication link to the computing engine (e.g., an NPU), which is often a low-bandwidth interface with data rate ...
